title: Typing Ritual
description:
Hi there! 
Since you're reading this, that means you're interested in our game—thank you! ✨

The gameplay is super simple: just type to summon an ancient god! That's it! Sounds easy, right? But maybe... there's more to it? If you're curious about the process, we highly recommend giving it a try!

Alright, that's everything you need to know about this game! 🎉 Thanks for reading! We release a new game every month, so if you enjoy this one—or if you like games that don’t take themselves too seriously—we might just get along!

Wishing you a great time, my friend! Much appreciated! 🙏
description_short: Typing Ritual is a first-person psychological horror game where players perform a summoning ritual by typing ancient texts. As the ritual progresses, the environment changes, and tension builds. Mistakes have consequences, and time is limited.
